C1AHSevo_WHUD_DoIP_V1.1

OBD Information

Protocol:
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 89
Func Name: HUD2

[
  {
    "diagversion": "65",
    "supplier": "A701",
    "soft": "9107122322",
    "version": "9100391002"
  }
]

    "name": "HUD Controller"
